module.name: AusPac Insurance Jobs
module.description: Demo module for AusPac Solar insurance inspection and makesafe job workflow, scheduling, rates allocation, and completion tracking.

fields.label: Service Required
fields.help_text: Description from insurer job pack / email.

ui.title: Job Pack Files
ui.description: Upload insurer email PDFs, purchase order, and job pack files.

ui.title: Work Orders
ui.description: Generated or uploaded work order PDFs for installer/insurer.

ui.title: Inspection Reports
ui.description: Completed inspection reports and supporting images/files.

ui.title: Communications
ui.description: Email screenshots, insurer confirmations, and related correspondence.

defaults.auspac_job_activity.subject: Identify installer, secure date and price
Contact customer and confirm inspection date
Review report, upload files, request invoice
Advise installer and insurer of confirmed date and generate work order
Installer to complete inspection report and determine if proposal is required
If required, create proposal deal in Pipedrive/OpenSolar

modals.title: Put Job On Hold
modals.description: Capture why this insurance job is being paused.

modals.title: Cancel Insurance Job
modals.description: Capture the cancellation reason for audit and insurer follow-up.
